channel.title: Home on Ika Qutami's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Ika Qutami's Blog

item.title: File Handling in Python
item.description: Learn how to read and write files and work with file paths in Python.

item.title: NLP with Machine Learning
item.description: Learn the fundamentals of Natural Language Processing (NLP) with machine learning, including text preprocessing techniques such as tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, stopword removal, Part-of-Speech (POS) tagging, and Named Entity Recognition (NER).

item.title: Python Dictionaries Data Structure
item.description: Learn Python dictionaries, including creating, accessing, modifying, iterating, dictionary methods, comprehensions, nested dictionaries, and practical examples.

item.title: Python List Data Structure
item.description: A comprehensive guide to Python Lists for beginners.

item.title: Python Sets Data Structure
item.description: Learn Python sets, including creation, operations, methods, set algebra, and practical examples.

item.title: Python Tuples Data Structure
item.description: Learn Python tuples, including creation, access, operations, packing, unpacking, nested tuples, and practical examples.

item.title: Publications
item.description: List of research publications and scientific papers.

item.title: Introduction to Natural Language Processing
item.description:
Natural Language Processing (NLP) is a field of Artificial Intelligence that enables computers to understand, process, and generate human language. By combining linguistics, computer science, and machine learning, NLP allows machines to analyze text and speech in ways that support meaningful interaction between humans and computers.

Machine learning has significantly advanced NLP by enabling systems to learn patterns directly from data rather than relying solely on manually defined rules. Modern NLP applications use machine learning algorithms to perform tasks such as text classification, sentiment analysis, machine translation, question answering, information extraction, and conversational AI.

item.title: Welcoming Post
item.description:
Hi, I’m Ika Utami.

I am lecturer and researcher in Artificial Intelligence, Applied Data Science, and Large Language Models (LLMs).

My work focuses on using AI and data-driven approaches to support learning and improve education. I am especially interested in developing innovative educational systems powered by LLMs and educational data.

This space serves as a platform for sharing my thoughts, research, and experiences in the field of Artificial Intelligence, with a particular focus on Natural Language Processing (NLP), Large Language Models (LLMs), and Applied Data Science.
